title: prunus depressa
intro: Prunus depressa, also known as the Round-leaved Hazel, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant's bark, leaves, and flowers possess medicinal properties, containing flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Prunus depressa include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Prunus depressa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
